rationale: Review 1's core placement complaint (wrong dir, must split bialgebra/hopf content out of AlgebraicGroup/) misreads the diff's explicit roadmap intent + docstring framing the file as Layer 0 target; acting on it forces needless restructuring. Its antipodeAlgHom claim is also ungrounded in the shown diff. Review 2 correctly flags a real but trivial internal namespace mismatch for one lemma (used once); acting on it changes nothing material. Both resulting PRs are essentially equivalent to the original.
